nasb.text: Now Jephthah the Gileadite was a valiant warrior, but he was the son of a harlot. And Gilead was the father of Jephthah.

esv.text: Now Jephthah the Gileadite was a mighty warrior, but he was the son of a prostitute. Gilead was the father of Jephthah.

cnv.text: 基列人耶弗他是個英勇的戰士；他是個妓女的兒子；耶弗他是基列所生的。

ccb.text: 基列人耶弗他是个英勇的战士，他父亲名叫基列，母亲是个妓女。
